humanLens2.note: 5/10 measured (W2 orders, W3 POS, W6 finance, W8 labor, W9 customers) on authed sgtest15; writable session confirmed — remaining 5 runnable the same way

rollup.chipOutcomes: ALL 5 spine chips RESOLVED: F1 #769✅, F6/F7 #136✅, F12 #773✅ (root-cause corrected: stockType, not deep-slash), F5 #772✅ code-verified, F15 mast-mcp-server#140✅ verified-live. F13 retracted. Follow-up chip task_6a770cff (mast-architecture): POS createdAt gap (F18, FIXED arch #334) + stray-doc cleanup (F17). F14 (P&L withholding) FIXED+DEPLOYED+CLOSED (mcp #141, task_14a258f4) — verified live 2026-06-22; the money-canary layer (test/money-canary.test.js CI-gated + scripts/qa-spine/money-canary.mjs) now pins it; ALL spine chips resolved. GROUND-TRUTH SCAN 2026-06-21 (canonical refs, all 3 repos + live runtime): 7 GENUINE product bugs (F1,F5,F7,F12,F14,F15,F18) — 1 high (F15, fixed), 6 med (5 fixed, F14 OPEN); earlier 'oversold ~9x' overstated, true ~2.6x raw-to-genuine; 3 of 7 (F1,F5,F14) needed cross-surface discovery. Backbone on origin/main is FAR more complete than local: 34 tests + 20 lints + fail-closed 67-route Playwright smoke + 3 cross-surface parity guards. Local checkout was 496 commits BEHIND origin/main — earlier 'no smoke gate / no test framework / F15 not on main' were ALL stale-clone errors (audit origin/main + live runtime, never the working tree). The qa-spine harness/docs are LOCAL-ONLY, not on main.

findings.title: Revenue byChannel fragmentation
findings.status: FIXED-VERIFIED both surfaces (PR #769 MERGED): MCP byChannel canonical (dtc_online/in_person); UI finance fresh-load shows In-Person $4,995 (=pos+direct-pos consolidated), Phone, Manual, Online Store. The earlier 'UI still fragmented' read (F13) was STALE JS — retracted.

findings.title: mast_orders reads are protected (agent token friction)
create_test segregates revenue to a 'test' channel (positive)
Cashflow bank balance 0 (stale Plaid); netCashPosition = AR-AP
Tax summary missingState orders (nexus/compliance gap)
findings.status: CODE-VERIFIED FIXED (PR #772 deployed): live /pos/ source has resolvePosTaxState(GPS studioState → seller home-state fallback) stamped on the sale (pos lines ~501-547,1280-1282) + unit test test/pos-tax-jurisdiction.test.js. My automated sale's missingState 6→7 is FULLY EXPLAINED, not a defect: headless browser has no GPS AND config/tax is NULL on sgtest15 (no home-state fallback) → resolvePosTaxState('','')=''. ACTIONABLE: a tenant must set config/tax.state for GPS-less POS sales to be tax-attributed.
findings.verifyNote: POS is a PWA (sw.js) — deployed POS-client fixes can be masked by the service worker; verify with SW-bypass or origin fetch (curl confirmed deployed source here)

findings.title: Metal-reprice showcase is precious-metal-specific (N/A on glass tenant)

NO MCP customer tool — mast_contacts exposes a DIFFERENT ~8-record 'contacts' collection (name/email/phone/category), NOT the 32 UI 'customers' (LTV/orders/spend/wholesale/segments/lapse/gross-margin). Agent can't see the customer base or any value metric. Lens-3 coverage decision: add a mast_customers tool?

Heavy test-data pollution on sgtest15: ~12 of 32 customers are QA/test cruft (_review_throwaway, _o3review x3, pr1d/PR3/PR5, QA-W2 Abuse, racetest, ZZ Refund, QA Spine W3 = my W3-proxy residual) + ZZ-TEST materials + blank/anonymous customer rows (one malformed: 3 orders/$4,650 = unlinked POS sales)
No classes/booking MCP tool — agent cannot operate a whole revenue line

POS sale didn't decrement inventory — VERIFIED FIXED. ROOT-CAUSE CORRECTION: real cause was a non-canonical stockType ('finished-goods', used by my own W3 fixture), NOT the client decrementInventory deep-slash-path I chipped (that is DEAD code; drawdown is server-side via submitOrder)
findings.status: FIXED-VERIFIED-LIVE: canonical-stockType (strict) POS sale decremented onHand 100→99 + wrote inventory history (action:sold, reason:pos_sale, actor:pos system). Fixed by #330 (CF normalize unknown→strict) + #139 (MCP reject bad stockType) + #773 (rm dead client code)
findings.foundBy: live UI run (A3); corrected on verify run
findings.groundTruth: scan: 'finished-goods' is NOT a user-selectable stockType (UI offers build-to-order/strict/stock-to-build) → was a test-fixture artifact + low-med server silent-skip hardening gap, NOT a high-sev live defect. Sev high→med. Fixed + regression-tested (arch stock-tracking.test.js).

findings.title: RETRACTED (false alarm) — 'UI channels still fragmented' was a STALE cached-JS read: hash-nav served the pre-#769 finance.js. Fresh full-load shows canonical In-Person/Phone/Manual/Online Store, matching the MCP. F1 is fixed on BOTH surfaces. Lesson: confirm MAST_MODULES_V / hard-reload before judging UI.

P&L quality divergence: UI withholds gross/net profit ('Margin withheld — COGS incomplete on 9 lines') but MCP finance_get_pnl returns gross/net with no caveat — an agent gets numbers the UI deems unreliable
findings.status: FIXED + DEPLOYED + CLOSED (2026-06-22). mast-mcp-server #141: finance_get_pnl now returns marginReliable/cogsLineMissingCount/cogsLineCoveredCount/cogsMissing, computed by the SAME formula as the UI computePnlLocal (finance.js:1869-1916); the UI gate marginText (finance-statements-v2.js:128) withholds gross/net ⟺ marginReliable:false. Live-verified sgtest15: marginReliable:false, cogsLineMissingCount:22, cogsLineCoveredCount:31. Pinned by test/money-canary.test.js; W6 reconciliation codified in scripts/qa-spine/money-canary.mjs. Chip task_14a258f4 CLOSED. Needed cross-surface discovery (single-surface tests miss it).
findings.foundBy: W6 UI cross-check vs MCP oracle

findings.title: mast_orders list crashes on non-string createdAt: '(b.createdAt||"").localeCompare is not a function' at limit 50 (some orders store createdAt as Firestore Timestamp object). Agent can't list orders; UI renders all 43 fine
findings.status: FIXED-VERIFIED-LIVE (mast-mcp-server PR #140 merged + dev-deployed): routed the sort through a shared dateStr() coercion helper (mirrored from the tenant-MCP repo, which had already solved it) + regression test orders-timestamp-sort.test.ts. Verified live: list limit 50→43 orders, limit 100→44, no crash, recent-first; POS orders SGTE-0195/0220/0221 now surface. NOTE: ~30 other localeCompare-on-timestamp sorts across platform-MCP tools share this latent crash (migrate to dateStr when touched). GROUND-TRUTH SCAN CONFIRMED FIXED: mcp origin/main HEAD == #140 merge commit (3ab6b53); sort routed via dateStr() at orders.ts:88; live list limit 50 = no crash. The earlier 'still crashing on main' doubt was a STALE CLONE (line had moved 83→88).

findings.title: POS orders never stamp createdAt — submitOrder POS-mode writes placedAt/deliveredAt but NOT createdAt (confirmed on SGTE-0220's full record). They sort LAST in every createdAt-keyed consumer + miss default-limit (20) lists. Writer-side gap in mast-architecture (not the MCP) — needs writer fix + backfill
findings.status: FIXED-VERIFIED (arch #334 merged): submitOrder stamps createdAt on every write path + Etsy/amendment writers + backfill + regression test order-createdat-stamp.test.js

findings.title: Order status taxonomy inconsistency: both 'pack' and 'packed' appear as statuses; lifecycle filter chips don't cover pack/packed/shipped

Malformed/empty order records (no orderNumber, 0 items, channel 'Online', Timestamp createdAt: nG6…, shopify_99787619{1,2,3}) — blank rows in UI; crashed the MCP list (F15). Stray-doc class — triage/cleanup
findings.foundBy: W2 UI; confirmed in F15 fix session

findings.title: MCP order revenue reads (o.total||0)*100 while UI reads _orderRevenueCents (prefers totalCents) — latent 100x divergence on the cents-in-the-dollar-field bad-data shape (SGTE-0187/0188). Does not move sgtest15's live aggregate today. Fix: adopt orderRevenueCents in mast-finance.ts (cross-repo MCP chip). Surfaced by the money-canary cross-surface contract review; pinned by the cents-vs-dollars case in test/money-canary.test.js.

moneyCanary.deterministic: test/money-canary.test.js — CI-gated; real shipped UI money math (finance.js helpers + byte-shared channel core + finance-statements-v2 marginText) == a canonical oracle, to the cent; divergence-demonstration block proves the fixture discriminates. Covers cents-vs-dollars, 100x, POS double-count, channel fragmentation, Timestamp coercion, and the F14 margin gate.
moneyCanary.live: scripts/qa-spine/money-canary.mjs — (A) MCP oracle self-check (W6 reconciliation matrix executable: revenue.total==pnl.revenue, gross==rev-cogs, net==gross-opex, marginReliable contract, Σ byChannel==total, all channels canonical) runnable today no-auth; (B) authed UI cross-check (rendered UI total==MCP total; UI margin-withheld ⟺ marginReliable:false). Exit 1 on divergence (negative-control verified).
